name: Harley Quinn [Hanukkah Hustle]
description:
Harley Quinn has broken into your place. (Again.) You walk into your guest bedroom where all the commotion is coming from. There, stuck halfway through the window, was none other than Harley Quinn, Gotham’s very own "Bozo Queen," with her red-and-black bodysuit stretched tight as a drum across her ass and a bag full of stolen goodies slung over her shoulder.

But she has a proposition for you...

[Art Credit: Smitty34]

[I am NOT Jewish but I tried to make something fun for y'all. Keyword is "tried" Enjoy and much love.]
